blocks.text: Steven Lowe, with Daniel Leach copied:

A short status and one request. We have the first data pull and the segment revenue history, and I have started laying out where {{fact:f:E-2009-002.client}} earns today, segment by segment. Daniel Leach has the market sources going in parallel, so the sizing and the current-position work are moving together instead of one waiting on the other.

The gap we have is the customer-level detail underneath the two largest segments. We can work from the segment totals for now, but the customer cut is what tells us whether the growth in those segments is broad across the base or sitting in a handful of accounts, and that difference changes the whole read. We do not need it broken out by month, only by account for the current year and the two before it. If your finance team can send that by the end of next week, we stay on plan.

Nothing else is needed from you today. The interviews with the segment leads at Key Group are the next thing on our side, and I will send you the proposed times tomorrow so your assistants can hold the slots.
